activation.treeSitterFailed: tree-sitter initialization failed, using regex fallback
scan.disabled: Envify is disabled. Enable it in settings and try again.
fixAll.confirm.title: Fix all {count} secrets?
fixAll.confirm.body:
This will:
• Replace hardcoded keys with environment variables
• Update .env file
• Ensure .gitignore includes .env
fixAll.success: Envify: Fixed {fixed} secrets, added {envVars} environment variables to .env.
fixAll.failed: Envify: Fix failed. Check console logs.
panel.title: Envify Scan Results
panel.subtitle: Workspace Secret Detection Report
panel.allClean.title: No Secrets Found
panel.allClean.subtitle: Your workspace looks secure!
diagnostic.format:
Detected {provider} API key in variable "{var}": {value}
Consider using environment variable: {envVar}
diagnostic.format.possible:
Possible {provider} API key in variable "{var}": {value}
Consider using environment variable: {envVar}
diagnostic.hover:
**Envify: {provider} secret detected**

- **Variable:** `{var}`
- **Value:** `{value}`
- **Suggested env var:** `{envVar}`

Click the lightbulb (💡) or press `Ctrl+.` to replace with an environment variable.
gitignore.missing: .env is not listed in .gitignore. Your environment file may be accidentally committed.
statusBar.tooltip: Envify: Click to scan entire workspace
config.title: Envify
config.entropyThreshold: Entropy threshold for unknown key detection (higher = stricter)
config.customPatterns: Custom regex patterns for additional secret types
config.excludePatterns: Glob patterns to exclude from scanning
config.largeFileThreshold: Files with more lines use regex-only scan
config.autoFixOnSave: Automatically apply Quick Fix on save (use with caution)
